details: Read eval/sharding.py auto_shard_config, rms_norm feature_spec/axes/helpers/conftest/test_golden. Analyzing WIDTH_SHARDED ragged-grid logic for non-tile-aligned W.

Confirmed op EXCLUDES {ROW_MAJOR,WIDTH_SHARDED,w_non_aligned} because auto_shard_config makes a ragged grid. Computed concrete shard for (1,1,64,50): bf16 wg=7 (7 cores, 7x1 not ragged); fp32 wg=13 (13 cores in 8x2 bbox, RAGGED).
